column1: # Worktree-dev repo registry.  One line per repo:  <slug><TAB><git-url>
# The slug is the short name you pass to `agent <slug> <name>` and `tokens`.
# The bare repo lives at  ~/dev/repos/<slug>/.bare  and worktrees at  ~/dev/worktrees/<slug>/<name>.
# Example (replace with your own — this file is yours, not shipped):
